## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or screenshots if relevant.

## Environment

- OS:
- Browser (if frontend):
- Python version (if backend):
- Node version (if frontend):
- How are you running the stack? (Docker / local dev)
